heading: Additional amendments to Articles of Agreement
label: 286e–5a Additional amendments to Articles of Agreement
text: The United States Governor of the Bank is hereby authorized to agree to and to accept the amendment to the Articles of Agreement in the proposed resolution entitled “Amendment to the Articles of Agreement of the Bank”, forwarded to the United States on .February 27, 1987
notes: CodificationSection 52 of act , is based on section 601 of title VI of H.R. 3750, One Hundredth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .July 31, 1945Dec. 11, 1987Pub. L. 100–202
